title: RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CORVALLIS REGIONAL OFFICE RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with rent, including back rent, and security deposits. Funding is limited and not guaranteed. Agency does not provide emergency shelter or motel vouchers. 1121 NW 9th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Individuals at risk of eviction or who are homeless and need assistance to move into permanent housing Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Walk in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 928-6335 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 752-1010 Main phone (541) 758-2609 Other Linn Benton Food Share Main phone (541) 928-6335 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or walk in to be screened for eligibility FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Eviction or late rent notice if currently housed AREA SERVED: Benton County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus stops within a block Services: Rent Payment Assistance Rental Deposit Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMODITY SUPPLEMENTAL FOOD PROGRAM FOOD - LINN BENTON FOOD SHARE HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORVALLIS REGIONAL OFFICE
